# Ali Cagatay

> Ali Cagatay is an AI engineer, software builder and founder based in Birmingham, United Kingdom, currently working as AI Engineering & Research Lead at Kollestee UK Global.

Ali specialises in deep learning, computer vision, agentic systems, and full-stack software engineering, taking research-grade AI from notebook to production. At Kollestee UK Global he leads applied AI research and engineering, taking new ideas from first experiments to deployed products.

He holds a BSc in Computer Science from the University of Birmingham and an MSc in Artificial Intelligence with Professional Placement from Birmingham City University, completed with a Distinction; his dissertation built a multimodal deep-learning model that predicts property prices across the Birmingham housing market by fusing geospatial and temporal data. He previously worked at ProBuild360 as an AI & Data Analytics Software Engineer (his MSc placement) and at Kollestee UK Global as a Machine Learning Engineer Intern. Since 2020 he has volunteered as a software engineering mentor at CodeYourFuture, leading Saturday classes that teach JavaScript, Python, Git, Jest and SQL to career-changers with no coding background. Outside of work, he builds and ships his own products and tools.

Core specialisms:

- Deep learning and multimodal AI
- Computer vision
- Agentic systems and retrieval-augmented generation (multi-agent, persona-routed pipelines)
- Full-stack software engineering (web, cross-platform and mobile applications)

The site is a single English-only minimalist landing page with anchored sections, plus a writings section. Ali speaks English and Turkish.

## Site

- [Home](https://alicagatay.xyz/): Introduction, a GitHub contribution heatmap of the last year of activity, and the sections below.
- [Work](https://alicagatay.xyz/#work): Chronological work history - AI Engineering & Research Lead at Kollestee UK Global (March 2026 - present), AI & Data Analytics Software Engineer at ProBuild360 (October 2025 - March 2026), Machine Learning Engineer Intern at Kollestee UK Global (June 2024 - September 2025), Volunteer Software Engineering Mentor at CodeYourFuture (September 2020 - present), and Software Engineer Intern at Invitelecom (August 2018 - September 2018).
- [Projects](https://alicagatay.xyz/#projects): Board of Directors RAG (a multi-agent RAG over 484 YouTube transcripts from 18 creators that routes each question to the right creator's persona), CouncilAgent (a voice AI assistant for Birmingham City Council that answers housing questions out loud - a Flutter app over an Azure OpenAI and Whisper backend, built in 5 hours with a 5-person team and placed 3rd of 15 at the Microsoft hackathon), Micro Marketing Assistant (a fast, minimal CRM for small businesses), and Focus Timer (a clean Pomodoro timer).
- [Education](https://alicagatay.xyz/#education): MSc Artificial Intelligence with Professional Placement at Birmingham City University (September 2024 - March 2026, Distinction) and BSc Computer Science at the University of Birmingham (September 2019 - July 2022).
- [Writings](https://alicagatay.xyz/writings): Occasional notes on AI, software engineering, product building, and founding.
- [Work with me](https://alicagatay.xyz/#contact): An enquiry form for product ideas, AI features, and half-built products that need building and shipping.
